title: DFU - Disconnecting/connecting earbuds to check DFU Pop Up
scenario: Verify DFU pop-up behavior when disconnecting and reconnecting earbuds during a software update
steps: Precondition: Earbuds are out of date with an update available.
Disconnect the right earbud (place it in the charge case).
Verify a "Update currently not available, please try back later" pop-up appears.
Verify return to Software Update screen.
Repeat the same disconnect/reconnect sequence for the left earbud.
expected: A "Update currently not available, please try back later" pop-up appears when an earbud is disconnected during an update. The pop-up persists after reconnecting the earbud. Dismissing the pop-up returns to the Software Update screen. The same behavior occurs for both the right and left earbuds.
